chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1703 of 2020 Fresh case 1. For order on Misc.No. 7763/20 2. For order on office objection no.27 3. For order on Misc.No.7764/20 4. For hearing of main case ----- 11.03.2020 Mr. Ahmed Nawaz, advocate for the petitioner. ------ Heard. The perusal of the petition reveals that the petitioner in order to prevent the ejectment of the members of Kachi Memon Markazi Jamayat Karachi has sought for investigation of the allotment of the houses in their possession. Such controversy being factual could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its Constitutional jurisdiction under the garb of election and audit of the funds of the Jamayat. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with the listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE
